intro: Russia is the primary region affected by remote code execution attacks tracked under the rce tag, with 20 articles published between April 12 and April 28, 2026. The threat actor PhantomCore was observed in these incidents. The severity mix includes 8 high and 12 critical vulnerabilities, with top CVEs including CVE-2025-54987 (CVSS 9.8), CVE-2025-0520 (CVSS 9.4), CVE-2026-39987 (CVSS 9.3), CVE-2026-22898 (CVSS 8.8), and CVE-2026-4682 (CVSS 8.8). Affected sectors are academia, enterprise, general, government, and healthcare.
